summary: Tested Admin Panel 3 new features: Rankings, Alerts, Cities Management. All 21 backend tests passed. Frontend testing confirmed all 11 tabs working. Rankings shows 4 cards (Top por Reservas, Mejor Calificados, Ciudades mas Activas, Categorias Populares). Alerts section in Overview shows pending businesses and open tickets. Cities tab shows 162 cities with search, filter, and toggle functionality.

Backend: Rankings business structure has id, name, booking_count - PASSED
Backend: Rankings city structure has city, businesses, bookings - PASSED
Backend: Rankings category structure has category, businesses, bookings - PASSED
Backend: Rankings requires admin auth - PASSED

Backend: Alerts structure has type, severity, title, detail, count - PASSED
Backend: Alerts types are valid (pending_business, open_tickets, bad_reviews, etc.) - PASSED
Backend: Alerts requires admin auth - PASSED
Backend: GET /api/admin/cities - returns paginated cities with business_count - PASSED
Backend: Cities structure has name, slug, business_count, active - PASSED
Backend: Cities search parameter works - PASSED
Backend: Cities active_only=true filter works - PASSED
Backend: Cities active_only=false filter works - PASSED

Backend: PUT /api/admin/cities/{slug}/toggle - activates city - PASSED

Backend: GET /api/admin/tickets - regression passed - PASSED
Frontend: Admin Dashboard has 11 tabs (Resumen, Negocios, Usuarios, Resenas, Categorias, Rankings, Ciudades, Configuracion, Soporte, Suscripciones, Finanzas) - PASSED
Frontend: Overview tab shows Alerts section with pending businesses and open tickets alerts - PASSED
Frontend: Rankings tab shows 4 ranking cards (Top por Reservas, Mejor Calificados, Ciudades mas Activas, Categorias Populares) - PASSED

critical_code_review_comments: All 3 new features (Rankings, Alerts, Cities) are properly implemented
Backend endpoints correctly exclude MongoDB _id from responses
Rankings aggregates data from approved businesses only
Alerts checks multiple collections (businesses, tickets, reviews, payments) for actionable items
City toggle creates audit log entries (CITY_ACTIVATE, CITY_DEACTIVATE)
All data-testid attributes properly implemented for testing
API integration in api.js correctly implements getRankings, getAlerts, getCities, toggleCity

success_rate.frontend: 100% (all 11 tabs working, all new features verified)

admin.note: Requires TOTP 2FA - use /app/scripts/get_admin_totp.py to generate code

seed_data_creation: No new seed data created. 162 cities exist in DB (all active=True), 51 businesses, 3 support tickets
context_for_next_testing_agent: Admin Panel now has 11 tabs. Rankings shows top businesses by bookings/rating, top cities, top categories. Alerts in Overview tab shows pending businesses, open tickets, bad reviews, past due subscriptions, no subscription businesses, held payments. Cities tab allows search, filter by active/inactive, and toggle city active status. Admin login requires TOTP 2FA - use /app/scripts/get_admin_totp.py.

mocked_apis_list: Cloudinary image uploads use emergent object storage fallback

features: Top por Reservas - businesses ranked by booking count
Mejor Calificados - businesses ranked by rating (min 1 review)
Ciudades mas Activas - cities ranked by business count and bookings
Categorias Populares - categories ranked by business count and bookings

alert_types: bad_reviews - resenas negativas (1-2 estrellas, ultimos 7 dias)

features: Search by city name or state
